title: Bizarre Industries Identity System Explicit Affinity Content and Visual Specification
purpose: Govern the exact content and visual construction of all 104 permanent mirrored subjects before Affinity or Figma production.

overviewSections: Subject navigation with every page ID and exact name
detailSections: Exact tokens, assets, styles, or material recipe
Variants, modes, states, and optical sizes
Category and related-page links plus canonical source paths

globalRules.gravityWellColorRule: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
globalRules.apertureDirectionRule: The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.
globalRules.signalLimeRule: Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.
globalRules.identityIntegrationRule: Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.
globalRules.imageWorkflow: ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
forbiddenProductionMethods: hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Definition.content: 00.00 · Cover: Open the public masterbrand with one unmistakable Bizarre signal: Gravity Well, CATCH THE STARS, and BEND -> ABSENCE -> SIGNAL.

Construction and source.content: 00.00 · Cover: focal specimen — A Display Field cover led by the exact Gravity Well, a single flat Lime trajectory, and live bilingual identity type. Composition — Use a 1440 × 900 Void field, an off-centre governed mark at environmental scale, a strict title rail, and one specimen/provenance rail. Construction sequence — Lock the ImageGen cover study inside 00 / Reference as nonpublishable. -> Place the governed monochrome mark without tracing or internal recoloring. -> Rebuild atmosphere with native gradients, live type, masks, and real metadata.

Motion and interaction.reason: N/A — 00.00 · Cover: the cover is a static identity specimen; any ceremonial opening uses the Capture contract documented in 08 without animating or rotating the mark

Production and export.content: 00.00 · Cover: Export documentation at 1440 px width and 144 DPI; retain live type, named layers, and source labels. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 00.00 · Cover: Correct: the full Lime mark sits on Void, the slogan is exact, spectrum stays outside the mark, and the page reads from across a room. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Definition.content: 00.02 · Getting Started / Authority / Source of Truth: Explain which artifact is authoritative, how a designer starts safely, and how provisional or concept material is kept out of releases.

Construction and source.content: 00.02 · Getting Started / Authority / Source of Truth: focal specimen — An authority ladder from canonical repository sources to derivative Figma/Affinity documentation and the separate Figma Make consumer. invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 01.01 · Design Philosophy / Swiss-Working: Define Swiss-working as functional precision becoming identity, not superficial International Style imitation.

Construction and source.content: 01.01 · Design Philosophy / Swiss-Working: focal specimen — A side-by-side operating principle: signal, instrument, data, reveal—each paired with a Bizarre implementation. Composition — Use a restrained Paper Precision Panel plus one tactile Display Field specimen to show method and emotional range together. Construction sequence — Lock the system-level ImageGen direction as concept-only reference. -> Set the four principles on a strict live-type grid. -> Reconstruct tactile depth using native gradients, masks, and governed assets.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Definition.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Govern one Bizarre Industries identity across products without creating subbrands or replacing host-native product systems.

Construction and source.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: focal specimen — A host-native integration instrument showing one identity above three product contexts: existing web component infrastructure, iOS with SwiftUI and iOS conventions, and macOS with SwiftUI and macOS conventions. Composition — Use one continuous integration chassis. Large host-owned fields carry native behavior and platform conventions; a narrow Signal channel carries restrained Bizarre recognition. No product receives a separate identity. Construction sequence — Audit the existing product infrastructure before styling. -> Preserve host navigation, controls, input, accessibility, typography defaults, density, and motion grammar. -> Apply only governed Bizarre tokens, state semantics, voice, composition, data visualization, and rare identity moments. -> Verify that the result feels native first and recognizably Bizarre second.

Exact tokens, assets, styles, or materia.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: exact mapped sources — identity (brand/identity.json; dbe5621b19a97b192a0337ca193cf26dda87ba874097ebd8e474408b70bd3fb9); architecture (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-15-bizarre-masterbrand-library-architecture.md; eed54703e15d3d34cd9f93d76f929d485628a99204ce0338bf62d3f33341e6bd); authority (governance/authority.json; 4034e71a20d461f8fdb2deb8e67cbcecfc323ee69f940d949dbc4b0bb0d255f7); uiContract (packages/ui/src/contract.json; 77aa09c98caa0c7764d5206cc00c419a702c860c934ff04c33399f2b3177daaf); uiComponents (packages/ui/src/components.css; f11d327168497694429aa7e506f1cc6fc0554e7f13b9876d6158d9c2a6316a46); nativeIntegrationResearch (docs/research/2026-07-16-native-integration.md; 0af0a154fb357139ddb946a2cc07b0f0aa27a986f2c6fc25c525a610087b7e51). Usage.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Use before theming, component changes, platform adaptation, or prototype work for any product.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Encode the host and Bizarre layers with labels, position, and structure rather than Signal Lime alone. Preserve host-native focus, keyboard, screen-reader, text-scaling, contrast, motion, and input behavior. Public Arabic copy remains NOT VERIFIED. Subject-specific application: Use before theming, component changes, platform adaptation, or prototype work for any product.

Motion and interaction.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Host motion and interaction conventions remain primary. Bizarre motion appears only for governed signal, state, or recognition moments, and reduced-motion behavior remains native and immediate.

Production and export.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Keep every platform lane as live type and editable native geometry. Embed no product screenshot, logo, gradient, ImageGen reference, or public Arabic copy on this governance page. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Correct: the product preserves its host framework and platform character while a restrained, functional Bizarre layer makes it recognizable. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 01.03 · Single Identity / Native Integration: Misuse: creating a subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity; reskinning standard controls; replacing navigation; inventing a React visual language; or forcing the brand onto every surface. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. Motion and interaction.content: 01.04 · Voice / CATCH THE STARS / Metadata Copy: Copy may reveal by reading order or Capture phase, but words do not scramble, orbit, or become decorative motion; reduced motion shows the final text immediately.

Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 01.04 · Voice / CATCH THE STARS / Metadata Copy: Correct: casual, direct, dry language; short statements; exact permanent copy; real measurements; equal bilingual authority. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 01.04 · Voice / CATCH THE STARS / Metadata Copy: Misuse: fake science, generic future claims, mission-statement filler, macho racing language, fake coordinates, or excessive exclamation. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define the exact Gravity Well master and its approved monochrome variants while preserving every internal path and proportion.
Correct: all internal paths are uniformly #000000 or uniformly #C6FF24, geometry and spacing are unchanged, and the source hash is recorded.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: mixed green/black paths, spectrum or gradient fills, glow, foil, bevel, clipping, cropping, redrawing, mirroring, rotation, or independent recoloring of rings.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 02.01 · Gravity Well Master & Approved Variants / FAR — A source-backed black master and a source-backed Signal Lime master over controlled Paper and Void fields. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 02.01 · Gravity Well Master & Approved Variants / NORMAL — Place the governed SVGs at identical geometry, overlay a difference-proof outline, and isolate the color rule in a verification rail. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 02.01 · Gravity Well Master & Approved Variants / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 02.02 · Name, Lockups & Coexistence: Govern the Bizarre Industries name, wordmark-like type treatments, lockups, and coexistence with host products or approved third-party identities without creating another Bizarre identity.

Construction and source.content: 02.02 · Name, Lockups & Coexistence: focal specimen — Live Bizarre Industries type paired beside, not fused into, the exact Gravity Well, plus clearly separated host-product attribution and third-party coexistence rules. Composition — Use live approved typography, optical alignment guides, clear-space ownership, and explicit attribution labels. Do not fabricate a partner mark when no exact approved asset is mapped. Construction sequence — Keep the mark as a linked canonical asset. -> Set the company name in the approved role without converting it into new logo geometry. -> Keep host-product attribution and approved third-party identity outside the Bizarre lockup clear-space boundary.

Usage.content: 02.02 · Name, Lockups & Coexistence: Use when the name must accompany the mark, identify the owner of a product surface, or coexist with an approved third-party identity; the mark may also stand alone where recognition is established.

Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 02.02 · Name, Lockups & Coexistence: Correct: one Bizarre Industries identity uses live name and canonical mark with clear attribution, equal bilingual authority, and no invented wordmark. Definition.content: 02.04 · Invariance, Misuse & Verification: Make logo invariance testable through source hashes, geometry comparisons, approved-color checks, and explicit misuse evidence.

Construction and source.content: 02.04 · Invariance, Misuse & Verification: focal specimen — A verification console showing source hash, vector bounds, path count, color uniformity, and pass/fail comparisons. Definition.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Govern Signal Lime as the invariant operational channel for active, ready, aligned, captured, synchronized, and current-path meaning.

Construction and source.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: focal specimen — A semantic state rail showing one Lime anchor per artifact, plus accessible Lime Ink and physically translated signal media. Composition — Use flat native swatches, labeled state specimens, one singular tracer, and measured foreground/background pairs. Construction sequence — Place Signal Lime, Lime Ink, and Lime Glow roles. -> Map allowed operational states. -> Demonstrate singular use against neutral and spectrum fields.

Exact tokens, assets, styles, or materia.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: exact mapped sources — tokenPalette (tokens/source/palette.tokens.json; 6a19e3a3fb43a93dc01905606c3005848cc77da00ae12c53f7818b226bf56a50); tokenBrand (tokens/source/brand.tokens.json; a572de5872ee8fd2b5c07676dd550d7cf17435522991c942535ad9b4153faf02); tokenModes (tokens/source/modes.tokens.json; f97c91499fd871c6327d67652616aa4d81dc53fe8d9b85083a20b6ad899add6f); designDoc (extensions/astronomical-atlas/DESIGN.md; 4bbe2429bb13f85103d447b8bd589b643f3b8809bd4a83798958e5fe96c53e7f); policyProduction (policies/production.json; 3b46d4912cb34cb657832cb53e96f0d61ad34b15c515bfa89e9b37e487442315). The visual recipe stores editable Affinity features, invariant mark rules, and the allowed concept-reference list; no unlisted source or approximation is permitted.

Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Screen Lime, Lime Ink on Paper, fluorescent spot, thread, enamel, retroreflective film, and illuminated translations retain one semantic role.

Usage.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Use only when something is active, selected, ready, captured, synchronized, aligned, live, or the current path.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Label every color role and value, show tested contrast, and never use hue as the only state signal. Subject-specific application: Use only when something is active, selected, ready, captured, synchronized, aligned, live, or the current path.

Motion and interaction.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Lime may change position or appear at a state transition, but its hue remains flat; reduced motion shows the final active location without travel.

Production and export.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Keep swatches as named native colors; include RGB/HEX and print translation notes without claiming unverified spot matches. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Correct: one clear Lime anchor is the highest-salience operational cue and is paired with shape or label. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 03.02 · Signal Lime Operational Channel: Misuse: ambient Lime decoration, multiple competing Lime tracers, grading Lime into spectrum, using Lime as body text on Paper, or tinting the mark internally. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 03.03 · Data-Shaped Spectrum: Define the photographic spectrum as a data-shaped field palette whose placement follows an explicit measured or synthetic quantity.

Construction and source.content: 03.03 · Data-Shaped Spectrum: focal specimen — An eight-stop spectrum mapped across one governed field with quantity, stop, salience, and material-response labels. Composition — Use primitive spectrum swatches, a native data field, and a mapping table that records what each position encodes. Construction sequence — Place the eight spectrum roles. -> Map stops to energy, curvature, density, heat, exposure, or another declared field. -> Keep non-Lime highlights below Signal Lime salience.

Definition.content: 04.01 · Field Gradient: Describe a continuous field quantity through native spectral interpolation while preserving the governed field shape and singular signal.

Construction and source.content: 04.01 · Field Gradient: focal specimen — A continuous spectral field clipped to governed contours with an alternate representation visible through the aperture. Composition — Use editable native gradients aligned to the field tensor, governed masks, and one flat Lime trajectory above the field. Construction sequence — Place the governed field geometry. -> Align spectrum stops to declared field values. -> Mask an alternate representation through the aperture without filling it as a badge.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: Only the listed concept references may appear, locked in 00 / Reference and visibly labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE; they cannot be traced, embedded, sampled into masters, or released.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Describe a continuous field quantity through native spectral interpolation while preserving the governed field shape and singular signal.
Correct: gradient follows field data, the aperture reveals the same dataset differently, and Lime remains singular and ungraded.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: freeform aurora blobs, decorative radial gradients, unrelated aperture imagery, multiple Lime paths, or gradient inside the mark.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 04.01 · Field Gradient / FAR — A continuous spectral field clipped to governed contours with an alternate representation visible through the aperture. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 04.01 · Field Gradient / NORMAL — Use editable native gradients aligned to the field tensor, governed masks, and one flat Lime trajectory above the field. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 04.01 · Field Gradient / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Model angle-dependent optical coating through controlled interference color without turning the brand into iridescent decoration.

Construction and source.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: focal specimen — A lens or coated-metal coupon shown at three angles with one measured highlight path and a stable Signal marker. Composition — Build with native multi-stop gradients, masked highlight bands, restrained blend modes, and a labeled angle axis. Construction sequence — Define substrate and coating. -> Set angle-specific color response. -> Keep information readable when the coating disappears.

Exact tokens, assets, styles, or materia.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: exact mapped sources — tokenPalette (tokens/source/palette.tokens.json; 6a19e3a3fb43a93dc01905606c3005848cc77da00ae12c53f7818b226bf56a50); tokenBrand (tokens/source/brand.tokens.json; a572de5872ee8fd2b5c07676dd550d7cf17435522991c942535ad9b4153faf02); designDoc (extensions/astronomical-atlas/DESIGN.md; 4bbe2429bb13f85103d447b8bd589b643f3b8809bd4a83798958e5fe96c53e7f); tokenMaterial (tokens/source/material.tokens.json; d9187741a039bb86cae5a7f25125cc53d16be113eb123c0e53bd9264265fdb45); policyProduction (policies/production.json; 3b46d4912cb34cb657832cb53e96f0d61ad34b15c515bfa89e9b37e487442315). The visual recipe stores editable Affinity features, invariant mark rules, and the allowed concept-reference list; no unlisted source or approximation is permitted.

Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Front, oblique, and grazing-angle states plus a flat-color fallback are required.

Usage.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Use for real optical surfaces, coated glass, lenses, or angle-dependent films only.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Pair data color with labels or geometry, preserve Lime salience, and supply a one-color or high-contrast reading. Subject-specific application: Use for real optical surfaces, coated glass, lenses, or angle-dependent films only.

Motion and interaction.reason: N/A — 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: the documentation specimen changes viewing angle rather than running a decorative loop; interactive angle response belongs to an approved mockup

Production and export.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Preserve native gradient stops and color spaces; include continuous, stepped, and one-color export guidance. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Correct: coating response is localized, physically motivated, lower in salience than Lime, and backed by a substrate note. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 04.02 · Optical-Coating Gradient: Misuse: full-page holographic wash, rainbow foil everywhere, simulated coating on the Gravity Well, or claiming measured response without a sample. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 04.03 · Data-Ramp Gradient: Translate an ordered numeric range into a reproducible color ramp with explicit stops, units, and out-of-range behavior.

Construction and source.content: 04.03 · Data-Ramp Gradient: focal specimen — A labeled scalar bar beside one field specimen and a one-color pattern fallback using the identical thresholds. Composition — Use native stepped and continuous gradients, tabular labels, unit ticks, and clipping rules. Construction sequence — Declare the quantity and unit. -> Bind each stop to a numeric breakpoint. -> Provide underflow, overflow, missing-data, and one-color behavior.

Definition.content: 04.04 · Heat Gradient: Represent temperature or thermal load with a physically ordered gradient and explicit safe, active, and fault thresholds.

Construction and source.content: 04.04 · Heat Gradient: focal specimen — A thermal strip mapped to real temperature values beside a component surface with threshold labels. Composition — Use an editable temperature ramp, clipped material mask, tabular unit labels, and non-color threshold markers. Construction sequence — Declare Celsius or Kelvin range. -> Place threshold indices and state labels. -> Keep Signal Lime reserved for active/current rather than heat magnitude.

Definition.content: 04.05 · Exposure Gradient: Describe photographic exposure rolloff, colored shadow, highlight halation, and grain as image response rather than a free decorative gradient.

Construction and source.content: 04.05 · Exposure Gradient: focal specimen — One approved image or material specimen with before/response views, histogram-like labels, and protected Signal Lime. Composition — Use native tonal gradients, blend ranges, masks, restrained grain, and highlight bloom outside identity geometry. Construction sequence — Start from an observed or approved source image. -> Map shadows, midtones, highlights, and halation. -> Exclude Signal Lime and the Gravity Well from grading.

Definition.content: 04.06 · Reflective-Film Gradient: Specify retroreflective-film response as a viewing and illumination condition with a stable daytime base and a controlled night reveal.

Construction and source.content: 04.06 · Reflective-Film Gradient: focal specimen — A day/night livery coupon showing the same seam under ambient and head-on illumination, with registration marks. Composition — Use native material gradients for simulation, exact vector separations, masks, and a labeled light/view geometry diagram. Construction sequence — Define daytime substrate color. -> Place the reflective layer as a separate registered plate. -> Show a night response without altering the underlying field geometry.

Misuse.content: 04.07 · Material-Response Gradient: Misuse: luxury gloss as ornament, baking effects into identity masters, false physical claims, or using one texture for every substrate. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 05.01 · Unbounded / Display: Define Unbounded as the rare ceremonial display voice for the permanent slogan, major openings, and high-recognition moments.

Construction and source.content: 05.01 · Unbounded / Display: focal specimen — A live CATCH THE STARS specimen from hero to compact display scale, paired with an equal-authority Arabic treatment. Composition — Use approved font files, live variable weight, measured tracking, and line-break specimens rather than outlined approximations. Construction sequence — Load Unbounded from the approved source. -> Set permanent copy at governed display weights. -> Test large, medium, and minimum display scales on Void and Paper.

Production and export.content: 05.01 · Unbounded / Display: Keep type live in master files; package approved fonts and licenses, then outline only a derivative printer file when required. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 05.01 · Unbounded / Display: Correct: few words, decisive scale, controlled line breaks, and enough space for the shape of the phrase. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Definition.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Define Noto Sans Arabic and Noto Sans Arabic UI as equal-authority implementation counterparts without faux stencil damage or decorative calligraphy.

Construction and source.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: focal specimen — A bilingual specimen set with Arabic display, body, compact UI, metadata, numerals, and mirrored reading order around a physically stable field. Composition — Use live Arabic type, correct shaping, language tags, direction frames, optical-area guides, and real translated copy. Construction sequence — Set approved Arabic families at matched semantic roles. -> Balance optical area within the bilingual tolerance. -> Test Arabic-leading and English-leading compositions with stable physical data.

Exact tokens, assets, styles, or materia.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: exact mapped sources — tokenTypography (tokens/source/typography.tokens.json; 128b1ac8e358f278498d93f591530be5052d1a0fb7cbeb60b23a19a904524926); fontCss (packages/assets/fonts/bizarre-fonts.css; 353945cd89e75623f363813df46877cf04b39f3bbbc7968e2221780ff2321fbf); policyBilingual (policies/bilingual.json; 51741bd887718e8e5c27f310fe68f49b8df43e78dd83573985e2aedfcf5c0448); designDoc (extensions/astronomical-atlas/DESIGN.md; 4bbe2429bb13f85103d447b8bd589b643f3b8809bd4a83798958e5fe96c53e7f); uiRtl (packages/ui/src/rtl.css; 7c27f5fd0f76fb36ec19406536c033474b9e1a95a81874a32dd4b16c03c326b0). The visual recipe stores editable Affinity features, invariant mark rules, and the allowed concept-reference list; no unlisted source or approximation is permitted.

Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Arabic display, body, compact UI, Arabic-leading, English-leading, and explicitly Arabic-native numeral variants require separate proofs.

Usage.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Use on every public bilingual artifact; neither language is a secondary translation strip.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Use semantic hierarchy, readable line lengths, optical bilingual balance, correct lang/dir behavior, and tabular numerals where data requires them. Subject-specific application: Use on every public bilingual artifact; neither language is a secondary translation strip.

Motion and interaction.reason: N/A — 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Arabic typography has no decorative motion; any reveal follows native reading order and preserves complete shaped words

Production and export.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Keep type live in master files; package approved fonts and licenses, then outline only a derivative printer file when required. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Correct: proper shaping, optical equality, native directional layout, real translation, and shared data aligned to a neutral rail. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 05.05 · Arabic Type System: Misuse: mirrored glyphs, CSS transforms, faux stencil cuts, decorative calligraphy in technical UI, tiny Arabic under large English, or untested numeral substitution. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Misuse.content: 06.03 · Display Field: Misuse: several competing hero objects, arbitrary space wallpaper, decorative parallax, unreadable large type, or hiding the Lime path. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 06.04 · Grid & Spacing: Specify the 4 px base scale, canonical spacing values, alignment datums, and responsive grid behavior for dense and open compositions.

Construction and source.content: 06.04 · Grid & Spacing: focal specimen — A spacing ladder, column and baseline specimens, dense/open transition examples, and logical-edge RTL proof. Composition — Use native guides, layout grids, live token labels, and real Precision Panel and Display Field fragments. Construction sequence — Render every canonical spacing value. -> Build dense and open examples from the same grid. -> Show logical start/end behavior without mirroring physical field coordinates.

Definition.content: 06.05 · Optical Sizes, Minimums & Responsive Scaling: Govern Micro, Small, Medium, Large, and Field optical sizes, minimum line weights, aperture minimums, and responsive scaling behavior.

Construction and source.content: 06.05 · Optical Sizes, Minimums & Responsive Scaling: focal specimen — One field and identity specimen rendered at all five optical sizes with allowed detail, line weight, and production profile labels. Construction sequence — Place each governed optical-size asset. -> Annotate detail allowed at that size. -> Verify screen, print, vinyl, and environmental minimums at 1:1 output.

Definition.content: 06.06 · Lines, Corners, Depth & Composition: Specify one- and three-pixel borders, 0–4 px core radii, limited pills, flat depth, and composition rules that feel machined rather than softly carded.

childMatrix.whenToUse: Use before generating, comparing, exporting, or approving any Atlas representation.
Use for high-resolution screens and display surfaces where continuous data response is supported.
Use where discrete states, low power, print, or manufacturing require fewer continuous tones.
Use for technical fields, livery, diagrams, print, and any medium where line structure reads better than continuous color.
Use only for internal evaluation of field depth and representation legibility.
Use where density is more robust than continuous color or where a tactile/print rhythm is useful.
Use for one-color print, engraving, low-power displays, tactile media, and simplified production.
Use only for internal evaluation of field texture, density, and production translation.
Use only to evaluate material logic before observed/licensed mockup bases and physical samples exist.
Use only for internal proof of production survival until aperture and representation approval passes.
Use below 48 px or 15 mm where full contours and microtexture cannot survive.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Explain one governed field rendered as continuous, stepped, contour, shaded, dot, hatch, grain, material, one-color, and micro representations.
Correct: one mass, one approved orientation, one aperture, one occlusion response, one Lime trajectory, and provenance on every child.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: unrelated decorative patterns, different fields per representation, missing source metadata, multiple tracers, or presenting provisional studies as released.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Definition.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Translate the shared field into discrete color bands whose thresholds remain traceable to the continuous source.

Construction and source.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: focal specimen — The governed band export beside its continuous parent and a labeled threshold table. Composition — Place atlas-bands.svg, expose band boundaries and values, and keep the aperture plus one flat Lime trajectory aligned. Construction sequence — Place the exact band derivative. -> Label every threshold and source mapping. -> Provide one-color and print separations from the same thresholds.

The visual recipe stores editable Affinity features, invariant mark rules, and the allowed concept-reference list; no unlisted source or approximation is permitted.

Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Screen, limited-ink, vinyl, low-power, reduced-motion, and one-color band counts are documented as governed profiles.

Usage.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Use where discrete states, low power, print, or manufacturing require fewer continuous tones.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Provide shape or label redundancy, preserve one active trajectory, keep the aperture legible, and do not mirror the field for RTL. Subject-specific application: Use where discrete states, low power, print, or manufacturing require fewer continuous tones.

Motion and interaction.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Band changes may step with data or replace travel in reduced motion; they must not flicker or reorder thresholds.

Production and export.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: All current Atlas artwork derives from the owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction and remains governed-provisional until source, accessibility, render, and production promotion evidence passes. This recipe uses governed-provisional inputs: the documentation page may follow its manifest publication status, but any export that embeds a provisional asset remains nonpublishable until that input is promoted with evidence. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Correct: bands preserve the same field and source thresholds, Lime stays separate, and production plates remain legible. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 07.03 · Stepped Bands: Misuse: arbitrary poster stripes, equal-width decoration, threshold changes between media, or using bands from a different field. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Construction sequence — Lock the allowed concept study in 00 / Reference. -> Place atlas-contours-large.svg without approximation. -> Build editable magnitude shading and aperture reveal from the same field.

Misuse.content: 07.05 · Shaded Contour / Provisional: Misuse: fake 3D rings, raster tracing, gradient inside the mark, arbitrary light direction, dominant aperture fill, or publication claim. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: Render the shared field as dot density whose spacing and size encode the same source values and survive screen or print.

Construction and source.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: focal specimen — Normal and large governed dot exports with density legend, aperture, one trajectory, and production minimums. Composition — Place exact dot SVGs, preserve dash/spacing logic, and compare density against the shared contour anchors. Construction sequence — Place normal and Large dot derivatives. -> Verify dots align to the shared field and aperture. -> Annotate minimum dot, gap, screen, and print behavior.

Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: Normal, Large, low-power, halftone, screen, one-color, and tactile translations retain the same field mapping.

Usage.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: Use where density is more robust than continuous color or where a tactile/print rhythm is useful.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: Provide shape or label redundancy, preserve one active trajectory, keep the aperture legible, and do not mirror the field for RTL. Subject-specific application: Use where density is more robust than continuous color or where a tactile/print rhythm is useful.

Motion and interaction.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: Density may step with state or data; reduced motion uses immediate density changes and avoids crawling dots.

Production and export.content: 07.06 · Dot Density: All current Atlas artwork derives from the owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction and remains governed-provisional until source, accessibility, render, and production promotion evidence passes. This recipe uses governed-provisional inputs: the documentation page may follow its manifest publication status, but any export that embeds a provisional asset remains nonpublishable until that input is promoted with evidence. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Render the shared field as directional hatching that encodes magnitude or orientation and supports simple production.
Correct: hatch structure derives from the same field, line weights pass production, and the Lime signal remains a separate plate.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: decorative diagonal wallpaper, arbitrary crosshatch, moire, unrelated angles, hand-drawn shortcuts, or hatching the Gravity Well itself.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: Only the listed concept references may appear, locked in 00 / Reference and visibly labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE; they cannot be traced, embedded, sampled into masters, or released.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Study governed-provisional reflective, UV, substrate, and optical responses while preserving one exact artwork separation.
Correct: material layers are editable and registered, field geometry is exact, the aperture reveals real construction logic, and claims stay NOT VERIFIED.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: square toy plate, duplicate trajectories, painted-on fake reflection, luxury gloss, raster tracing, unsupported durability claims, or publication.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Rules and anti-patterns.content: 08.00 · Motion & Interaction Overview: required result — Correct: Approach, Compress, Eclipse, Lock, Release occur in order, Lime marks the active path, and state labels confirm meaning. Prohibited result — Misuse: generic spin, continuous orbit, decorative parallax, motion without state, rotating the mark, or disabling all transitions with a wildcard. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Far, normal, and close examples.content: 08.00 · Motion & Interaction Overview / FAR — A ten-subject timeline from Approach through Release, plus timing, reduced-motion, and component-feedback branches. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text. 08.00 · Motion & Interaction Overview / NORMAL — Use live phase labels, governed state frames, timeline ranges, one exact field, and one Lime tracer. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable. 08.00 · Motion & Interaction Overview / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.

Definition.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: Define Capture as the complete transition from approach through compression, eclipse, lock, and synchronized release.

Construction and source.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: focal specimen — The governed five-frame sequence with one tracer, stable field source, aperture interaction, status labels, and timing ranges. Composition — Place capture-sequence.svg, rebuild editable phase states, and link every phase to capture tokens and accessible status text. Construction sequence — Place the exact sequence asset and source metadata. -> Build live state frames for all five phases. -> Annotate normalized phase ranges, duration variants, and reduced-motion result.

Motion and interaction.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: Approach -> Compress -> Eclipse -> Lock -> Release. Reduced motion shows captured state with aperture, active Lime indicator, and status text.

Production and export.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: Document start/end states, durations, easing, frame rate, and reduced-motion export; do not flatten the capture sequence into an unexplained video. This recipe uses governed-provisional inputs: the documentation page may follow its manifest publication status, but any export that embeds a provisional asset remains nonpublishable until that input is promoted with evidence. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: Correct: one tracer follows the fixed field, disappears through the aperture, confirms capture, and returns at a synchronized origin. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 08.01 · Capture Sequence: Misuse: spinning logo, orbit loop, phase reordering, multiple tracers, motion without status text, or hiding completion behind the aperture. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define Approach as stable inbound travel before field compression, with target, intent, and current path already understandable.
Correct: the field is stable, tracer is singular, target is visible, and status says ready or approaching.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: starting inside the aperture, accelerating without context, hiding the target, multiple paths, or moving the Gravity Well.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 08.02 · Approach / FAR — Start and end state frames showing the tracer entering a stable governed field before the compression zone. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 08.02 · Approach / NORMAL — Use the shared field asset, exact phase range, one Lime tracer, visible target, and ready status label. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 08.02 · Approach / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 08.03 · Compress: Define Compress as visibly tightening intervals near the mass to communicate force and imminent capture.

Construction and source.content: 08.03 · Compress: focal specimen — A phase comparison showing field interval compression and tracer timing without changing the field identity or rotating the mark. Composition — Use governed contour anchors, capture range tokens, easing labels, and one tracer whose spacing reflects the physical model. Construction sequence — Place start/end compression frames. -> Tighten field intervals from the governed source. -> Map tracer timing and status to the compression phase range.

Exact tokens, assets, styles, or materia.content: 08.03 · Compress: exact mapped sources — tokenCapture (tokens/source/capture.tokens.json; 9aa9800b02cef2a5aece083794bb694a5481c994782735be0c1334c116ae89ff); tokenMotion (tokens/source/motion.tokens.json; d309baee4fc7f8a6d945814b57547bba6da10258caa48fef4778d736ec4d5e32); uiMotion (packages/ui/src/motion.css; ba587e3e1d1e53fc75c10f0648bb7cb5336bdd8356c006253f104ad5ef21e3d2); designDoc (extensions/astronomical-atlas/DESIGN.md; 4bbe2429bb13f85103d447b8bd589b643f3b8809bd4a83798958e5fe96c53e7f); atlasContoursLarge (packages/atlas/generated/atlas-contours-large.svg; a9b98e58ebdbc8afb0c42a1d7946cf681a8a5fa96a29e94dcd13face5f647e97); captureSequence (packages/atlas/generated/capture-sequence.svg; 281c6f14a86098eaa075a6c8f4d1a6a6d1b7de4040d06c58d534bbeefcdd7aa8). Variants, modes, states, and optical siz.content: 08.03 · Compress: Ceremonial, fast UI, large installation, stepped low-power, and reduced-motion end-state variants preserve the same force cue.

Usage.content: 08.03 · Compress: Use when approaching the acquisition threshold and field force must become legible.

Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and R.content: 08.03 · Compress: Provide a captured-state reduced-motion alternative, retain status text, avoid vestibular travel, and keep keyboard state feedback visible. Subject-specific application: Use when approaching the acquisition threshold and field force must become legible.

Motion and interaction.content: 08.03 · Compress: Intervals tighten and tracer timing compresses; the mark does not rotate, and reduced motion switches to the compressed end frame without travel.

Production and export.content: 08.03 · Compress: Document start/end states, durations, easing, frame rate, and reduced-motion export; do not flatten the capture sequence into an unexplained video. This recipe uses governed-provisional inputs: the documentation page may follow its manifest publication status, but any export that embeds a provisional asset remains nonpublishable until that input is promoted with evidence. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 08.03 · Compress: Correct: force is visible through governed interval change, the tracer remains on its path, and status progresses predictably. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 08.03 · Compress: Misuse: elastic wobble, arbitrary scaling, spinning rings, unrelated blur, color cycling, or compression that changes the aperture shape. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 08.04 · Eclipse: Define Eclipse as the brief disappearance of the active tracer through the fixed Continuous Lens Aperture.

Construction and source.content: 08.04 · Eclipse: focal specimen — Before, hidden, and after-eclipse frames with aperture mask, focus preservation, and status text. Composition — Use the corrected smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction as a native mask, one Lime trajectory, capture phase boundaries, and an alternate representation inside the reveal. Construction sequence — Construct the smooth provisional aperture mask without sharp outline features. -> Occlude only the tracer segment that physically crosses it. -> Preserve focus, target, and eclipse status in every state.

Definition.content: 08.05 · Lock: Define Lock as the explicit state change that confirms capture through label, shape, position, and one Lime anchor.

Construction and source.content: 08.05 · Lock: focal specimen — The moment of capture with locked target, status output, active index, and optional short mechanical press response. Composition — Use component state tokens, live status text, a single Lime confirmation, and a stable captured field frame. Construction sequence — Set the final captured geometry. -> Change state label and non-color indicator. -> Apply one short confirmation response without moving the mark.

invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define Lock as the explicit state change that confirms capture through label, shape, position, and one Lime anchor.
Correct: confirmation is clear without color, focus remains visible, status announces captured, and the field stops at a stable frame.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: confetti, bounce, long celebration, color-only confirmation, multiple Lime flashes, or success without status output.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Definition.content: 08.06 · Release: Define Release as the tracer reappearing at a new synchronized origin or path while the captured state remains understandable.

Construction and source.content: 08.06 · Release: focal specimen — A locked-to-released state pair with new origin, released label, preserved provenance, and optional continuation path. Composition — Use governed path geometry, release phase tokens, one Lime tracer, and live released/synchronized status. Construction sequence — Place the locked starting frame. -> Reintroduce the tracer at the governed synchronized origin. -> Update status and preserve captured record or provenance.

Definition.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: Define reduced-motion and low-power alternatives that preserve Capture meaning, status, aperture, and active signal without travel or crawling texture.

Construction and source.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: focal specimen — Side-by-side full-motion, reduced-motion captured state, and low-power stepped-band state with the same outcome. Composition — Use explicit media-query behavior, final-state frames, stepped bands or dots, status text, and retained focus treatment. Construction sequence — Identify every moving element. -> Replace travel with the final captured state. -> Use stepped data changes for low power and keep essential feedback.
