Motion and interaction.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: Remove travel, continuous orbit, crawling grain, and nonessential parallax; retain immediate state change, aperture, one Lime indicator, status text, and focus.

Production and export.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: Document start/end states, durations, easing, frame rate, and reduced-motion export; do not flatten the capture sequence into an unexplained video. This recipe uses governed-provisional inputs: the documentation page may follow its manifest publication status, but any export that embeds a provisional asset remains nonpublishable until that input is promoted with evidence. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: Correct: the same task completes with the same state and information, without vestibular motion or excessive power use. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 08.08 · Reduced Motion & Low Power: Misuse: disabling every transition, removing confirmation, hiding status, freezing in an intermediate phase, or replacing movement with flashing. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 08.09 · Micro-interactions & State Feedback: Govern hover, focus, press, loading, success, error, status, and reveal feedback as concise mechanical state communication.

Construction and source.content: 08.09 · Micro-interactions & State Feedback: focal specimen — A component-state strip showing Signal Action and Status Indicator across pointer, keyboard, touch, loading, success, and error. Correct examples.content: 09.01 · SDS / Host-Infrastructure Boundary: Correct: nested SDS/native infrastructure remains intact, Bizarre styles are tokenized, and known consumers pass comparison. Misuse.content: 09.01 · SDS / Host-Infrastructure Boundary: Misuse: detaching instances, replacing focus management, inventing a router/form/dialog runtime, or claiming a wrapper owns host behavior. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Composition — Use host-native button or anchor elements, live labels, token-bound surfaces, one flat Lime active treatment, and a 3 px focus ring. Construction sequence — Preserve native button/anchor semantics. -> Apply primary and quiet token bindings. -> Render default, hover, focus, pressed, disabled, loading, success, and error states.

invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Specify Signal Action as the primary action wrapper that uses flat Signal Lime because an operation becomes active.
Correct: one clear action, native semantics, 44 px target, visible focus, honest loading/result, and flat Lime only where active.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: Lime as decoration, nested links, pill-by-default styling, disappearing labels, hidden focus, spinner-only status, or custom button runtime.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Definition.content: 09.04 · Status Indicator: Specify Status Indicator as a polite live output for idle, ready, aligned, active, captured, released, and fault states.

Construction and source.content: 09.04 · Status Indicator: focal specimen — A seven-state output strip using text, shape, position, and constrained Lime semantics across all modes. Composition — Use the native output element, role=status, aria-live=polite, live labels, state icon/shape, and token-bound surfaces. Construction sequence — Render every named state. -> Pair color with text and shape. -> Verify live-region behavior, focus context, and high-contrast translation.

Definition.content: 09.06 · Calibration Label: Specify Calibration Label as a low-tech, high-recognition metadata component that survives label-maker and one-color constraints.

Construction and source.content: 09.06 · Calibration Label: focal specimen — A physical/digital label with ATLAS / ID, SOURCE, STATE, version/date, seed or catalogue reference, and one Lime anchor. Composition — Use a semantic header, live mono metadata, real or labeled-synthetic identifiers, measured grid, and separate one-color/spot plates. Construction sequence — Set all required fields with truthful values. -> Align labels and values on a compact technical grid. -> Test Paper, Void, one-color, label-maker, and physical dimensions.

invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define Matte Void and Gloss Void as two controlled responses on the primary dark chassis, with information surviving when gloss disappears.
Correct: matte carries the chassis, gloss reveals one useful layer at close range, and edges remain credible.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: gloss everywhere, floating glass-card effect, unreadable black-on-black data, animated shine, or gloss on the Gravity Well mark.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 10.01 · Matte and Gloss Void / FAR — A split dark coupon showing matte field, localized gloss reveal, edge light, contamination, and one-color fallback. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 10.01 · Matte and Gloss Void / NORMAL — Use native low-salience gradients, blend modes, masks, and separate finish layers over the same Void substrate. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 10.01 · Matte and Gloss Void / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 10.02 · Aluminum and Brushed Aluminum: Define aluminum and brushed aluminum as fabricated substrates with directional grain, machined edges, engraving, and honest fastener logic.

Construction and source.content: 10.02 · Aluminum and Brushed Aluminum: focal specimen — A shallow machined coupon showing raw/anodized aluminum, brushed direction, chamfer, engraving, and registered artwork. Composition — Use native linear gradients, restrained noise, clipping masks, engraved live paths, and separate edge/fastener layers. Construction sequence — Set alloy/finish target and brushing direction. -> Build substrate and machined edge separately. -> Place artwork and engraving as registered vectors.

Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define Signal Spot Media as the physically required translations of flat Signal Lime across ink, vinyl, enamel, thread, illumination, and retroreflection.
Correct: every physical translation keeps the same operational meaning, uses one signal anchor, and remains NOT VERIFIED until sampled.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: decorative fluorescent coverage, several Lime materials competing, gradient thread, simulated swatch treated as approval, or spectral mark fill.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 10.04 · Signal Spot Media / FAR — A material swatch rail showing screen Lime, candidate spot ink, fluorescent film, enamel, thread, LED, and reflective seam with verification status. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.

distanceChecks.close: 10.04 · Signal Spot Media / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Define assembly, seams, fasteners, tolerances, edge conditions, dust, fingerprints, and wear as evidence of how an object is built and used.
Correct: fasteners and seams explain manufacture, wear appears where touched or exposed, and artwork follows real panel boundaries.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: random screws, fake scratches, wear as aesthetic noise, impossible seams, floating layers, or no path from flat artwork to assembled object.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 10.07 · Assembly, Seams, Fasteners & Wear / FAR — An exploded and assembled specimen showing substrate stack, seams, fasteners, adhesive, service access, wear zones, and artwork registration. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 10.07 · Assembly, Seams, Fasteners & Wear / NORMAL — Use native vector cross-sections, perspective groups, live callouts, realistic masks, and separately controlled wear layers. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 10.07 · Assembly, Seams, Fasteners & Wear / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 11.01 · Image Direction: Define image direction around real objects, mechanisms, landscapes, night tracks, desert, mountains, workshops, contact sheets, and visible construction.

Construction and source.content: 11.01 · Image Direction: focal specimen — An observed-image contact sheet annotated for subject, light, color response, texture, assembly detail, distance, and provenance. Composition — Use observed, licensed, or original sources; apply controlled exposure response outside identity geometry and retain visible seams, wear, and material truth. Construction sequence — Classify and record each image source. -> Select images with real construction and useful scale cues. -> Apply restrained film response while excluding the mark and Signal Lime from grading.

Production and export.content: 11.01 · Image Direction: Mockup bases must be observed, licensed, or original and explicitly approved; concept bases remain locked, labeled, and nonpublishable. This recipe has no governed-provisional file input in its exact source map; its export still follows the subject verification and publication gates. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 11.01 · Image Direction: Correct: real making, warm highlights, colored shadows, restrained vibrancy, grain, controlled halation, and visible construction support the work. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 11.01 · Image Direction: Misuse: stock teamwork, synthetic sci-fi cities, excessive neon, generic luxury studio shots, grade applied to Signal Lime, or gradients/material effects on the mark. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 11.02 · ImageGen → Affinity Reconstruction & Mockup Honesty: Govern the mandatory ImageGen -> Affinity workflow so generated imagery establishes direction while governed vectors, live type, and real production logic build the deliverable.

Construction and source.content: 11.02 · ImageGen → Affinity Reconstruction & Mockup Honesty: focal specimen — A three-stage evidence strip: locked concept target, native Affinity reconstruction, and same-input side-by-side visual QA with provenance. Composition — Use a visibly labeled 00 / Reference layer, exact source assets, native gradients/masks/blends/perspective, live type, and an approved observed/licensed/original final base. Construction sequence — Generate or receive one subject-specific concept target. -> Lock and label it CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. -> Reconstruct from governed sources, then compare reference and render at the same viewport and state.

Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 11.02 · ImageGen → Affinity Reconstruction & Mockup Honesty: Correct: concept pixels stay locked and nonpublishable, reconstruction uses governed sources and native tools, the exact mark stays monochrome, and comparison drives corrections. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 11.02 · ImageGen → Affinity Reconstruction & Mockup Honesty: Misuse: tracing ImageGen, embedding its pixels in canonical art, Python-generated graphics, simplistic line approximations, fake vectors, grading the mark, or calling a concept mockup production proof. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Definition.content: 11.04 · Calibration Label / Sticker: Specify calibration-label and sticker applications that retain provenance, state, one signal, and production credibility from low-cost paper to durable film.

Construction and source.content: 11.04 · Calibration Label / Sticker: focal specimen — A 1:1 sticker family with cut paths, Paper/Void fields, one-color and spot-Lime separations, material stack, and applied-object proof. Composition — Use live calibration-label content, exact vector cut lines, native masks, physical units, substrate/adhesive labels, and observed/licensed/original mockup bases. Construction sequence — Build the flat production artwork first. -> Separate cut, substrate, ink, optional spot Lime, laminate, and adhesive. -> Apply in perspective to a credible surface without changing artwork geometry.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Specify calibration-label and sticker applications that retain provenance, state, one signal, and production credibility from low-cost paper to durable film.
Correct: artwork works flat and applied, metadata is real, the mark is fully black on Paper/Signal or fully Lime on Void, and production layers are explicit.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: only a perspective mockup, no cut path, fake foil, tiny fake data, mixed-color mark, gradient mark, or durability claim without a sample.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

Definition.content: 11.05 · Hardware Panel / Camera Body: Specify hardware-panel and camera-body applications through real assembly, machined controls, readable calibration, and governed field placement.

Construction and source.content: 11.05 · Hardware Panel / Camera Body: focal specimen — A credible camera or instrument body with panels, seams, fasteners, dial, label, material stack, field window, and exact mark placement. Composition — Use observed/licensed/original object bases, native perspective/mesh, exact vectors, masks, material layers, live labels, and assembly callouts. Construction sequence — Start from a provenance-complete hardware base. -> Map artwork to real panels and manufacturing processes. -> Keep controls, seams, fasteners, mark, and aperture physically plausible.

Motion and interaction.content: 11.05 · Hardware Panel / Camera Body: Functional dials and Capture indicators may move; the mark remains fixed, monochrome, and effect-free, with reduced-motion state equivalence.

Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 11.05 · Hardware Panel / Camera Body: Correct: object construction leads, artwork follows surfaces, the mark is fully Lime on Void or black on Signal/Paper, and controls remain usable. Definition.content: 11.06 · Pit Instrument / Dial: Specify pit-instrument and dial applications for rapid reading under time pressure, glare, distance, and day/night conditions.

Construction and source.content: 11.06 · Pit Instrument / Dial: focal specimen — A mounted dial or pit clock with large indices, one Lime pointer, tabular output, enclosure, glare test, and synchronized Capture state. Composition — Use the governed dial, host-native interaction for digital proof, observed/licensed/original housing, native perspective, and real timing labels. Construction sequence — Build the flat dial and state logic. -> Place it into a credible instrument housing. -> Test far reading, glare, night visibility, focus, and captured synchronization.

visualRecipe.conceptReferencePolicy: No ImageGen concept reference is allowed on this subject. Use only the listed source mappings and approved observed/licensed/original bases where a mockup requires one.
invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Specify pit-instrument and dial applications for rapid reading under time pressure, glare, distance, and day/night conditions.
Correct: first glance tells time/state, one Lime pointer is current, housing is credible, and any mark is fully Lime on Void or black on Signal/Paper.
prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: decorative numerals, needle bounce, multiple pointers, unreadable output, rotating or graded mark, fake timing, or glare-free fantasy render.
Python-generated graphics
hand-redrawn or simplified Gravity Well geometry
programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines
tracing or embedding ImageGen pixels into canonical artwork
flattened gradients where an editable native gradient is required

distanceChecks.far: 11.06 · Pit Instrument / Dial / FAR — A mounted dial or pit clock with large indices, one Lime pointer, tabular output, enclosure, glare test, and synchronized Capture state. The dominant silhouette, exact mark context when present, and singular Signal cue must read without close text.
distanceChecks.normal: 11.06 · Pit Instrument / Dial / NORMAL — Use the governed dial, host-native interaction for digital proof, observed/licensed/original housing, native perspective, and real timing labels. Functional hierarchy, state, labels, and representation become readable.
distanceChecks.close: 11.06 · Pit Instrument / Dial / CLOSE — Inspect native construction, source labels, hashes, material/process details, bilingual behavior, and provisional or evidence status.

Definition.content: 11.07 · Film / Physical Media: Specify film and physical-media applications through real format geometry, edge information, labels, handling wear, and one-color survival.

Construction and source.content: 11.07 · Film / Physical Media: focal specimen — A film canister, cassette, reel, or physical media object with edge codes, calibration label, field strip, seams, and handling marks. Composition — Use observed/licensed/original media bases, exact format dimensions, native perspective/masks, live metadata, separate print plates, and controlled wear. Construction sequence — Choose and document a real media format. -> Build flat wrap/label artwork with seams and bleed. -> Apply to the object and verify handling, edge, one-color, and bilingual behavior.

Definition.content: 11.09 · Vehicle Livery / Day: Specify daytime vehicle livery for high-speed recognition through broad lensing bends, visible aperture, singular fluorescent Lime trajectory, and real panel construction.

Construction and source.content: 11.09 · Vehicle Livery / Day: focal specimen — An observed/licensed/original vehicle in daylight plus flat side/top/front artwork, panel seams, cut-vinyl separations, and far-distance proof. Composition — Use real vehicle geometry, native perspective/mesh, governed field assets, exact mark placement, vinyl panels, seam/fastener logic, and registration labels. Production and export.content: 11.09 · Vehicle Livery / Day: Mockup bases must be observed, licensed, or original and explicitly approved; concept bases remain locked, labeled, and nonpublishable. Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Correct examples.content: 11.09 · Vehicle Livery / Day: Correct: broad field bends carry recognition, one fluorescent Lime slingshot remains active, the aperture is visible, and any mark is fully black or fully Lime only. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 11.09 · Vehicle Livery / Day: Misuse: flat childlike car drawing, random stripes, multiple Lime streaks, artwork across forbidden seams, mixed/gradient mark, or no flat production art. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

invariantRules: The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden.
Approved Gravity Well contexts are: fully Signal Lime figure on Void; fully black figure on Signal; fully black figure on Paper.
Signal Lime remains a flat invariant operational channel and never grades into another hue.

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

ImageGen pixels may appear only on a locked 00 / Reference layer labeled CONCEPT REFERENCE — NONPUBLISHABLE. Canonical vectors and production artwork use governed geometry, native Affinity features, live type, and source-backed materials.
requiredVisualFacts: Route print, registration, fabrication, export, accessibility evidence, approval, and full-guide assembly as explicit release gates.

prohibitedShortcuts: Misuse: green checkmarks without evidence, publishing provisional assets, mixed/graded mark in export, missing restore path, or claiming 100% coverage from page count alone.

programmatic placeholder rings or unrelated decorative lines

Bizarre Industries is the only identity. Products preserve their host system and platform conventions, then receive a restrained Bizarre recognition layer. No subbrand, child brand, derivative Bizarre identity, or product-specific Bizarre identity may be created.

The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Misuse.content: 12.05 · Accessibility, RTL, Motion & Visual-QA Evidence: Misuse: separate unpaired screenshots, self-reported PASS, cropped failures, no keyboard/RTL state, rotating or graded mark, or physical claims from visual simulation. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.

Every Gravity Well instance keeps the exact original paths, is entirely Signal Lime on Void or entirely black on Signal/Paper, and receives no gradient, spectrum, material, glow, foil, bevel, or mixed internal color. Every Continuous Lens Aperture silhouette follows the smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric-oval direction; machined bevels remain outside the outline.

Correct examples.content: 12.07 · Full Brand Guide Assembly / Release / Handoff: Correct: all 104 subjects map exactly, unresolved provisional items remain blocked, the full mark rule is checked in every export, and handoff points back to sources. Approved Gravity Well contexts, when the mark appears, are fully Signal Lime on Void, fully black on Signal, or fully black on Paper.

Misuse.content: 12.07 · Full Brand Guide Assembly / Release / Handoff: Misuse: copying child content into a second authority, hiding NOT VERIFIED rows, releasing provisional Atlas assets, mixed/gradient mark anywhere, missing archive, or declaring completion before gates pass. The Gravity Well is monochrome: every internal element is either fully Signal Lime or fully black. Mixed green/black construction, spectrum, gradient, foil, glow, bevel, and material effects on the mark are forbidden. The owner-selected Continuous Lens Aperture v2 direction is a smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression. The silhouette has no chamfer, sharp edge, corner, polygonal join, clipped wedge, notch, straight segment, or key cut. Any machined cue is an external physical bevel or material-depth treatment around the opening, never part of the outline. Numerical construction and production evidence remain provisional; the superseded sharp-edged proposal is rejected and noncanonical.
